style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, divided into two contrasting halves by a thin vertical rule. On the LEFT half, a simple seated person token reads a single dense page labelled BRIEFING NOTE, its cramped horizontal text-lines suggesting a narrow channel, with a small rust tag ABOUT 40 BITS/S. On the RIGHT half, the same simple person token stands inside a large, immersive three-dimensional simulation rendered in light isometric line work: floating volumetric blocks and flowing connection lines, with many tiny agent tokens at work transforming a tangled system into an orderly grid of modules at the far side labelled CLARIFIED END STATE; label the scene INTERACTIVE 3D SIMULATION. A small caption below reads WIDEN THE CHANNEL, NOT SIMPLIFY THE TRUTH. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond simple tokens.
composed_prompt:
